prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-FOBBRSRSB-STD Product Type: GUN_SUPPORT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Body Bag Rear Shooting Rest System Flatline Ops Lightweight Adjustable Description: THE FUTURE OF SHOOTING BAGS

The BODY BAG is the latest product from Flatline Ops to improve accuracy. Simply rest the butt of your rifle on the BODY BAG and roll or unroll for your desired height. Add the BOOSTER BAG core for more unlimited heights. The center-lock recoil support channel keeps the stock centered and stable before and after recoil, eliminating side-to-side movement. For micro-height adjustments, simply slide the BODY BAG forward or backward on the stock.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION

Made with highly durable, water-resistant Cordura and filled with polypropylene micro-pellets, the BODY BAG is ultra-lightweight and won't hold water and weigh you down. The BODY BAG BELT allows you to choose to wear the bag as a belt or sling for quick retrieval and access.

The basics are simple. Place the BODY BAG under the rear of the firearm resting it onto the center-lock recoil channel. Roll or un-roll the bag to a desired height. For micro-adjustments, simply slide the bag forward or back on the butt. Search Terms: shooting bag range bag rest rear shooting bag firearms gear equipment shooting accessories essentials supplies hunting gear equipment gun gear bags sniper rifle scope for rifles night vision Features: - Color: Brown - Unrolled Dimensions: 34" x 5.5" - Rolled-up Dimensions: 4.5" x 5.5" - Weight: 16 oz. - Material: 500 Din Cordura, Nylon === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
